title: Intsoc-transactor document pipeline ↔ Branch-newspaper publication

data_flows.name: validated_document
data_flows.description: Documents validated and fixed by intsoc-transactor are submitted for publication via branch-newspaper.

data_flows.name: consent_metadata
data_flows.description: IPR declarations, author consent status, and publication consent travel with the document.

data_flows.name: publication_receipt
data_flows.description: IPFS CID and publication URL returned after successful publication.

rules: Document submission format changes require coordinated release
consent-aware-http middleware (planned) will mediate this seam

semantic_invariants: Documents must pass all intsoc checks before crossing this seam
Consent metadata must be present and valid for publication to proceed
IPFS CIDs returned must be verifiable against document content hash
security_invariants: No plaintext credentials in document metadata
Author identity verified via IPR declaration before publication
privacy_invariants: Author contact details not published unless explicitly consented
Draft documents remain private until publication consent given

conformance.notes: Create test documents that pass through full pipeline

no_hidden_channels.notes: Verify consent-aware-http properly gates all document flows

failure_behavior.timeouts: Publication timeout at 30s; IPFS pin timeout at 60s
failure_behavior.retries: Up to 3 retries with exponential backoff for IPFS failures
failure_behavior.backpressure: Queue documents when IPFS node is overloaded
failure_behavior.idempotency: Re-submission of same document returns existing CID

rollout_steps: Update intsoc-transactor submit command to use middleware
Configure branch-newspaper to accept middleware-verified documents
